title: Silky Sour Japanese Tofu Stir-fry
description: A hangover-cure-inspired dish featuring silky tofu with a tangy kick from sour cream and toast as a side, perfect for breakfast or snack time.

ingredients.name: Silken tofu
ingredients.notes: Make sure to drain excess water before use.

ingredients.name: Croutons or toast cubes (for garnish, optional)

instructions: Blend tofu in a blender until smooth.
In a small bowl, mix sour cream, ketchup, dijon mustard and water. Add salt to taste and blend well.
Pour the blended tofu into the sauce mixture and stir evenly until all ingredients are combined.
Garnish with croutons or toast cubes if desired.
